query:
SELECT deal_id FROM "ob-poc".deals
                WHERE deal_name ILIKE '%' || $1 || '%'
                ORDER BY
                    CASE WHEN deal_name ILIKE $1 THEN 0
                         WHEN deal_name ILIKE $1 || '%' THEN 1
                         ELSE 2 END,
                    deal_name
                LIMIT 1
